word: G1806 - ἐξάγω - exágō - ex-ag'-o - Bring forth

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐξάγω

- Transliteration: Exago

- Phonetic: ex-ag'-o

- Definition:

1. to lead out

- Origin: from G1537 and G71

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1537 and G71; to lead forth: - bring forth (out) fetch (lead) out.
